<!-- One-line summary of your idea -->

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable? -->

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. Mockups, diagrams, or pseudocode are welcome. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered? -->

- [ ] New visual effect
- [ ] UI / UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] New export/import format
- [ ] Other: ___________

<!-- Anything else to help us understand the request -->
